jobs.title: IT Manager NGO Job Trees for the Future
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? Trees for the Future is hiring an IT Manager in Nairobi skilled in Microsoft 365 administration, vendor management, identity and access management, and cybersecurity.
responsibilities: TREES is building a dedicated internal IT function for the first time, and the Information Technology (IT) Manager will play a foundational role in shaping it.

This is a hands-on role focused on enabling staff to do their best work. The IT Manager will oversee day-to-day IT operations, including staff support, Microsoft 365, identity and access management, cybersecurity, device management, software licensing, and vendor relationships, while building the systems and standards needed to support a growing global organization.

Reporting to the Vice President of People & Culture, the IT Manager will partner closely with People Operations, managed service providers, and external technical advisors to deliver a secure, reliable, and people-centered IT experience. The role will also lead key initiatives such as the rollout of Rippling IT, SharePoint governance, AI governance, and provide day-to-day guidance to in-country IT Coordinators as TREES expands its IT presence across Kenya, Uganda, and Tanzania.
requirements: An enthusiastic advocate for TREES’ mission and values. You believe technology is a strategic enabler of impact and are excited to help build thriving rural economies, resilient food systems, and a healthier planet.

A trusted IT partner. Staff know your name not because something went wrong, but because you showed up before it did. You communicate clearly, follow through, and genuinely care about the experience of the people you support.

A builder, not just an operator. You are energized by the opportunity to bring structure to a messy environment. You don’t need a perfect starting point​,​ you build toward one. You’re comfortable being the only IT person in the room.

An M365 expert. You’ve managed SharePoint, Teams, Exchange Online, and Entra ID hands-on. You understand what good looks like for a distributed organization, and you know how to get there from where things are today.

A strong vendor manager. You’ve directed the work of an MSP or IT service provider; ​​not just submitted tickets, but held vendors accountable, navigated contract renewals, and made sure their work served your organization’s actual needs.
jobs.howToApply: Click here to apply

jobs.title: Software Engineering Team Lead Job M-KOPA Solar
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? M-KOPA Solar is hiring a Software Engineering Team Lead skilled in software development, agile team leadership, system architecture, and project delivery.
requirements: Strong hands-on background in C#/.NET backend development
Proven experience with Azure, AWS, or GCP – we work in Azure but welcome experience across major cloud providers
Solid understanding of event-driven architecture and microservice development – we use Azure Service Bus, and welcome experience with similar messaging technologies such as Kafka or RabbitMQ
Experience leading or mentoring engineers in a collaborative team environment
Ability to set technical direction and provide architectural guidance

jobs.title: Lead AI Engineer – Financial Inclusion Job M-KOPA Solar
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? M-KOPA Solar is hiring a Lead AI Engineer skilled in machine learning, predictive modeling, and credit scoring algorithms.
responsibilities: Lead two AI Ops Engineers — own their delivery, development, and day-to-day work
Prioritise efficiently — manage competing requests from multiple teams by applying a clear prioritisation framework you’ll help develop and improve
Build and ship automations and agents that measurably improve how internal teams and customer-facing staff work
Keep the AI tooling stack healthy as usage scales across 2,500+ employees
Stay current on emerging AI tools and technologies – know what’s hype and what’s actually useful
Help refine AI training for the wider organisation, including Engineering teams
requirements: We’re looking for someone with a strong technical background and product-focused. You won’t be building models – we have Data Science teams for that. You’ll be building agents, shipping automations, and leading a team that makes M-KOPA’s internal operations smarter and faster.

jobs.title: Sacco ICT Systems Officer Job Co-operative Bank
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? Co-operative Bank is hiring a Sacco ICT Officer skilled in core banking systems, infrastructure, databases, and information security.
responsibilities: Managing and maintaining the SACCO’s ICT infrastructure, networks, servers, and applications.
Providing technical support to users and ensuring minimal system downtime.
Administering the Core Banking/SACCO Management System and related digital platforms.
Monitoring system performance and implementing improvements.
Managing ICT security, access controls, backups, and disaster recovery procedures.
Maintaining network equipment, firewalls, routers, switches, and internet connectivity.
requirements: Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Information Systems, or a related field.
Professional ICT certifications such as CCNA, CCNP, CISA, CISM, CEH, CompTIA Security+, Microsoft, or related certifications will be an added advantage.
Minimum of three (3) years’ relevant work experience in ICT systems administration, networking, or ICT support, preferably within a SACCO, microfinance institution, or banking environment.
Experience in managing Core Banking/SACCO Management Systems.
Knowledge of network administration, cybersecurity, database management, and system administration.

jobs.title: Frappe Full Stack Engineer Job ICRC
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? ICRC is hiring a Frappe Full Stack Engineer skilled in Frappe, Python, JavaScript, and ERPNext customization.
responsibilities: Designs, develops and maintains the new Protection digital ecosystem using the Frappe Framework;
Builds REST APIs and integrates external systems and services;
Designs and optimizes MariaDB database structures and queries;
Develops responsive frontend interfaces using JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and Frappe UI tools;
Creates custom DocTypes, reports, workflows, scripts, and dashboards;
Writes server-side business logic in Python;
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in IT engineering degree or equivalent. ITIL & DevOps certification is an asset;
Minimum 2 yrs experience of production Frappe development, with deep mastery of DocType metadata, workflows, permission hooks, custom report builder, RQ background jobs, scheduled events;

Minimum 3 years frontend, of which 1 yr on Frappe UI (Vue) in production. Deep Progressive Web App (PWA) / Service Workers / Background Sync experience; client-side persistence patterns; conflict UI; offline UX; Right-To-Left (RTL) layouts, i18n;
Minimum 5 yrs experience of production development in Python;
Significant experience in integrating and running complex technical solutions is mandatory;

jobs.title: Network Engineer Job Zetech University
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? Zetech University is hiring a network engineer to design, maintain,and troubleshoot campus network infrastructure, The role is based in Ruiru and professional certification in networking is required.
responsibilities: Design, configure, deploy, monitor, and maintain LAN, WAN, WLAN, VPN, firewall,  routing, switching, and internet connectivity infrastructure.

Install, configure, and maintain routers, switches, wireless access points, firewalls, controllers, structured cabling, fibre links, patch panels, cabinets, UPS-backed network equipment, and related infrastructure.
Maintain network documentation including topology diagrams, IP address plans, VLAN plans, configuration records, rack layouts, cabling records, change logs, and asset registers.
Conduct regular preventive maintenance, firmware updates, configuration backups, and lifecycle reviews for network equipment.

Implement and maintain network security controls including firewall rules, VLAN  segmentation, access control lists, VPN security, intrusion prevention, secure Wi-Fi authentication, and network access controls.
Monitor network traffic, logs, alerts, and anomalies to detect performance issues, cyber threats, misuse, and unauthorised access.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Telecommunications, Electrical/Electronic Engineering, Computer Engineering, or a related field.
Professional certification in networking such as CCNA, CCNP or equivalent.
At least 3 years relevant experience.
Experience in a university, large institution, ISP, enterprise environment, data centre, or multi-site organisation will be an added advantage.
Experience supporting CCTV, access control, IP telephony, cloud services, or Enterprise Systems integration will be an added advantage.
jobs.howToApply: Click here to apply

All employees have a responsibility to adhere to safety, health, and wellbeing  policies, guidelines and procedures in all actions and decisions.
Manage and set priorities for the design, maintenance, development, and evaluation of all infrastructure systems including LANs, WANs, Wireless and Internet.
Manage the Local Area Network within the offices, · Manage the Wide Area Network to the branch offices including the Retail Shops and Care Centers · Manage the Wireless Network within the offices
Manage the Internet Perimeter and associated systems
Manage and operate Cisco Unified Communications environment
requirements: BSc. Computing, engineering or similar related degree.
Project management Certification
ITIL Foundations, CCNP, CCIE
6 years experience in a networked and dynamic environment, with 2 years at a management level
Must possess hands-on experience with a wide range of Cisco LAN and WAN platforms and the Cisco IOS

jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? Jubilee Insurance is recruiting a Software Quality Assurance Engineer. Based in Nairobi, it requires expertise in test automation, functional testing, and CI/CD pipelines.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Software Engineering, or a related field from a recognised institution.
Professional certification such as ISTQB Foundation or Advanced Level, or equivalent, is an added advantage.
Certifications in Agile, DevOps, Cloud Technologies, or Test Automation are an added advantage.
Minimum of 3–6 years’ experience in Software Quality Assurance within a software development environment.

jobs.title: Cyber Security Analyst Job KCB Bank
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? KCB Bank is recruiting a Cyber Security Analyst in Nairobi. It requires technical expertise in data security, vulnerability management, and regulatory compliance.
responsibilities: Design, implement, and maintain data security controls such as data classification, labelling, encryption, and data loss prevention (DLP), across systems, applications, and cloud platforms.
Develop and maintain data security policies, standards, procedures and Minimum-Security Configuration Baseline Standards in line with industry best practices and regulatory requirements.
Ensure compliance with applicable regulations and frameworks (e.g., Kenya Data Protection Act, ISO 27001, GDPR, and/or other relevant standards).
Collaborate with the Cybersecurity Intelligence and Security Operations Centre (CISOC) in the continuous monitoring and defense of the Bank’s infrastructure against cybersecurity threat.
Support secure adoption of new technologies, applications, and platforms to ensure cybersecurity requirements are met before introduction to production environments.

Lead the end-to-end vulnerability management lifecycle for databases and datastores by executing assessments across cloud and on-premises infrastructure, performing risk-based prioritization, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to remediate and continuously report on compliance.
requirements: SC-401: Information Protection Administrator Associate CISA: Certified Information
CEH: Certified Ethical Hacker;
CISA: Certified Information Systems Auditor;
CISM: Certified Information Security Manager
CISSP: Certified Information Systems Security Professional
jobs.howToApply: Click here to apply

jobs.title: Full-Stack Web Developer Job (40-45K)
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? Corporate Staffing Services is recruiting a Full-Stack Web Developer position for a training and consultancy institution. The salary for the role is Ksh 40,000 – 45,000 monthly. The job is based in Nairobi. Proficiency in front-end and back-end development, database design, and API integration is required.
requirements: A degree or diploma in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, Web Development, Data Systems or a related field.
Demonstrable experience developing web-based applications, dashboards, portals, management information systems, SaaS platforms or institutional digital solutions.
Strong practical skills in front-end technologies such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript and modern frameworks such as React, Vue, Angular or similar tools.
Strong practical skills in back-end development using technologies such as Node.js, PHP, Python, Laravel, Django, Express, Java, .NET or similar frameworks.
Good understanding of database design and management using MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Firebase or similar database systems.
jobs.howToApply: If you are up to the challenge and possess the necessary qualifications and experience, please send your CV only quoting the job title in the email subject (Full-Stack Web Developer) to:jobs@corporatestaffing.co.kebefore6thJuly2026.

jobs.title: Team Leader Business Systems Job Bank of Africa
jobs.description: To ensure minimal interruption of services by ensuring the stability, reliability and efficiency of all business systems within the bank.
responsibilities: Risk Management– Mitigate operational risk by ensuring the timely performance of backups and test restores according to the schedule, promptly closing audit findings, and conducting Disaster Recovery tests as scheduled to maintain preparedness and minimize potential disruptions to operations.

Service Availability– Ensuring continuous uptime and accessibility for all channels and business applications to serve customers and internal users effectively. Proactively limiting unplanned downtime to minimize disruptions and ensuring the bank returns to operational status within the Recovery Time Objective (RTO) in any eventuality.

Service Desk Management– Effectively resolving raised tickets by closely monitoring the ticket closure process and ensuring adherence to Service Level Agreements (SLAs). Additionally, liaising with stakeholders for timely ticket resolution and handling escalations when necessary to maintain high service standards and customer satisfaction.

Project Implementation– Ensuring the successful implementation of IT business systems projects by achieving all project milestones and actively participating in the implementation and testing of projects outside IT as required, ensuring seamless integration and functionality across the organization.

End-of-Day Batch Processing– Ensuring the successful completion of end-of-day batch processing by overseeing processes on Core Banking, Clearing System, and Recoveries System to ensure accuracy and timeliness. Promptly escalating any issues that may delay batch processing to facilitate timely resolution and maintain operational efficiency.
Team Management– Ensuring effective team management by providing guidance, training, and support to enhance team effectiveness and efficiency in achieving organizational goals.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, computer engineering or IT related field.
Must have thorough knowledge of linux/unix, Oracle MySQL, MSSQL
Project Management essential
jobs.howToApply: Click here to apply
